app.name: uDraw Probe
app.short_description: Probe app for the THQ uDraw GameTablet on Wii.
app.long_description: Controls - A: start/stop capture - B: save captured samples to sd:/udraw_probe_capture.txt to sd:/udraw_probe_capture.txt - 1: clear capture buffer and observed min/max - HOME: exit SD Card capture When capture is enabled, the app records up to 512 samples of raw report bytes plus decoded fields in memory. Press B to write them to sd:/udraw_probe_capture.txt for later inspection.
